reviews.title: Best headphones I've ever owned
reviews.body: The noise cancellation is absolutely phenomenal. I work from a busy open office and these have been life-changing. Battery easily lasts a full workday even with ANC enabled.

reviews.title: Great but a bit pricey
reviews.body: Sound quality is exceptional. The ANC is the best I've heard. My only complaint is the price point — you're paying for the Sony name. The call quality could be better outdoors.

reviews.title: Noise cancellation is unreal
reviews.body: Used these on a 14-hour flight. Could barely hear the engine. Comfort is top-notch, can wear for 6+ hours without fatigue. Touch controls take a bit of getting used to.
